creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just reinstalled from the fresh ports tree:

# pwd
/usr/local/doc/libgfbgraph
# ls -la 
total 68
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel    512 Jan 15 15:28 .
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel    512 Jan 15 15:28 ..
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel     35 Jan 15 15:28 AUTHORS
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  26425 Jan 15 15:28 COPYING
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel      2 Jan 15 15:28 ChangeLog
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  15749 Jan 15 15:28 INSTALL
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   1099 Jan 15 15:28 NEWS
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    218 Jan 15 15:28 README
# pkg which README
/usr/local/doc/libgfbgraph/README was installed by package gfbgraph-0.2.2_1

nothing in /etc/make.conf that may trigger this.
